visa_types.name: Transit Visa (TS)
visa_types.documents_required:
- Passport or travel document with validity not less than 6 months and contain at least ONE completely empty visa page.
- Completed and signed application Form
- Photo. One copy of 2 inch size photo (photo must have white background with a full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses and must be taken within 6 months)
- Valid Taiwan ID card or Residency visa
- For Transit
- Evidence of travel from Thailand to a third country or destination (confirmed air ticket paid in full)
- For Sport
- Certificate from concerned authority of which supports the participation of the visa applicant or visa applicant’s agency in their country.
- 2Invitation letter from the sport event organizer.
- For Crew
- Employment certificate as crew
- Please note if your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is not travelling with you and is not your first-degree relatives (your parents and children). You need to provide
                                a completed, signed, and sealed

Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

The trustee is required to provide the
                                proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling with
                                you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes 
- For nationals from Afghanistan, Algeria, Bangladesh, Cameroon, China, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Egypt, Equatorial Guinea, Ghana, Guinea, India, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Liberia,
                                Libya, Middle Africa, Nepal, Nigeria, North Korea, Pakistan, Palestine, Republic of the Congo, Sao Tome and Principe, Sierra Leone, Somalia, Sri Lanka Sudan, Syria, and Yemen must have a resident visa (ARC) in Taiwan to apply for a tourist visa and have to submit the application in person. 
- For other nationals other than the countries listed above can also apply for a visa if they can prove that they legally entered and stayed in Taiwan.
- Consular officers reserve the rights to request additional documents as deemed necessary
- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.
- 4. Upon entering Thailand, the immigration officer may request evidence of adequate finance. For Transit visa, the value must be the equivalent of at least 10,000 Baht per person
                                and 20,000 Baht per family.
Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6gXixCNLDKSIW1cAjKp82C/c7c85c861bf697f68432cd3521e8db1b/Transit-Visa-Checklist.pdf)
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing Time will be approximately 4-5 working days. 
Note :
- If there is any further verification required on the submitted documents there will be a further delay in the above mentioned processing time.
- The travel date should be minimum seven working days from the date of submission at Thailand Visa Application Centre.

Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Transit Visa (TS)
This type of visa is issued to applicants who wish to travel in transit through the Kingdom in order to proceed to the country of destination or to re-enter his or her own country.

## Validity of a Visa :
The validity of a visa is 3 months. 

## Period of Stay :
Travelers coming to Thailand with this type of visa will be permitted to stay in the Kingdom only for a short stay before transitting to a third country.

## Visa Fees

## Visa and VFS Service Fee

[Table:Transit Visa (TS)]
Kindly Note: 
- Visa and VFS service fee listed above is per applicant.
- All fees and charges are non-refundable, even if the application is refused or withdrawn.
- The fee mentioned includes all Local Taxes.
- Applicants are requested to collect appropriate receipts while opting for any additional services.

## Documents Required
- Passport or travel document with validity not less than 6 months and contain at least ONE completely empty visa page.
- Completed and signed application Form
- Photo. One copy of 2 inch size photo (photo must have white background with a full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses and must be taken within 6 months)
- Valid Taiwan ID card or Residency visa
- For Transit
- Evidence of travel from Thailand to a third country or destination (confirmed air ticket paid in full)
- For Sport
- Certificate from concerned authority of which supports the participation of the visa applicant or visa applicant’s agency in their country.
- 2Invitation letter from the sport event organizer.
- For Crew
- Employment certificate as crew
- Please note if your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is not travelling with you and is not your first-degree relatives (your parents and children). You need to provide
                                a completed, signed, and sealed

Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

The trustee is required to provide the
                                proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling with
                                you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes 
- For nationals from Afghanistan, Algeria, Bangladesh, Cameroon, China, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Egypt, Equatorial Guinea, Ghana, Guinea, India, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Liberia,
                                Libya, Middle Africa, Nepal, Nigeria, North Korea, Pakistan, Palestine, Republic of the Congo, Sao Tome and Principe, Sierra Leone, Somalia, Sri Lanka Sudan, Syria, and Yemen must have a resident visa (ARC) in Taiwan to apply for a tourist visa and have to submit the application in person. 
- For other nationals other than the countries listed above can also apply for a visa if they can prove that they legally entered and stayed in Taiwan.
- Consular officers reserve the rights to request additional documents as deemed necessary
- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.
- 4. Upon entering Thailand, the immigration officer may request evidence of adequate finance. For Transit visa, the value must be the equivalent of at least 10,000 Baht per person
                                and 20,000 Baht per family.
Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6gXixCNLDKSIW1cAjKp82C/c7c85c861bf697f68432cd3521e8db1b/Transit-Visa-Checklist.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
- One color photograph
- 2 Inch * 2 Inch
- 3.2 to 3.6 cm face Height
- Photo must have white background
- full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses
- Must be taken within last 6 months

## Processing Time
Processing Time will be approximately 4-5 working days. 
Note :
- If there is any further verification required on the submitted documents there will be a further delay in the above mentioned processing time.
- The travel date should be minimum seven working days from the date of submission at Thailand Visa Application Centre.

## Download Forms
Please click here to download 
Thailand Visa application form. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3OvEl8GNIpovwh2h0RjW6T/ad6798446489f7aa98d83158b98fd9f7/thailand-visa-application-form.pdf)
Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

visa_types.name: Non-Immigration (B) Business Single Entry Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Passport or travel document with validity not less than 6 months and contain at least ONE completely empty visa page.
- Completed and signed application Form
- Photo. One copy of 2 inch size photo (photo must have white background with a full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses and must be taken within 6 months)
- Valid Taiwan ID card or Residency visa
- Proof of funds. Copy of the passbook. the applicant’s name and account name must be same, and the balance must be updated to the day before the application date
- An original letter from a company in Taiwan to Thailand Trade and Economic Office stating the company in Thailand's name and other purposes to Thailand (The letter must be typed in the company’s letter head and signed by an authorized person and affixed the company seal)(Validity of the letter is one month)
- Copy of the aforementioned company's license must be signed by an authorized person and affixed the company seal
- Copies of the aforementioned

company's registration certificate (https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/YykHYtRMc8/Visa/wnon-b1.png)

and

investment certification (https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/YykHYtRMc8/Visa/wnon-b2.jpg)

, issued within 6 months (Copies of company documents must be signed by an authorized person and affixed the company seal)
- Please note if your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is not travelling with you and is not your first-degree relatives (your parents and children). You need to provide a completed, signed, and sealed

Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

. The trustee is required to provide the proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling with you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes 
- Consular officers reserve the rights to request additional documents as deemed necessary
- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.
- Upon entering Thailand, the immigration officer may request evidence of adequate finance. For Transit visa, the value must be the equivalent of at least 20,000 Baht per person and 40,000 Baht per family.
Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5G0EQd16yoNAtVeVBGSQMr/4e259e8070c1557cdd490c3faf6d60ca/non-immigration-business-single-entry-visa-checklist-july-2022.pdf)

Note :
- If there is any further verification required on the submitted documents there will be a further delay in the above mentioned processing time.
- The travel date should be minimum seven working days from the date of submission at Thailand Visa Application Centre.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Non-Immigration (B) Business Single Entry Visa
This type of visa is issued to applicants who wish to enter the Kingdom of Thailand for business or trade purposes.

## Visa Fees

## Visa and VFS Service Fee

[Table:Non-Immigration (B) Business Single Entry Visa]
Kindly Note: 
- Visa and VFS service fee listed above is per applicant.
- All fees and charges are non-refundable, even if the application is refused or withdrawn.
- The fee mentioned includes all Local Taxes.
- Applicants are requested to collect appropriate receipts while opting for any additional services.

## Documents Required
- Passport or travel document with validity not less than 6 months and contain at least ONE completely empty visa page.
- Completed and signed application Form
- Photo. One copy of 2 inch size photo (photo must have white background with a full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses and must be taken within 6 months)
- Valid Taiwan ID card or Residency visa
- Proof of funds. Copy of the passbook. the applicant’s name and account name must be same, and the balance must be updated to the day before the application date
- An original letter from a company in Taiwan to Thailand Trade and Economic Office stating the company in Thailand's name and other purposes to Thailand (The letter must be typed in the company’s letter head and signed by an authorized person and affixed the company seal)(Validity of the letter is one month)
- Copy of the aforementioned company's license must be signed by an authorized person and affixed the company seal
- Copies of the aforementioned

company's registration certificate (https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/YykHYtRMc8/Visa/wnon-b1.png)

and

investment certification (https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/YykHYtRMc8/Visa/wnon-b2.jpg)

, issued within 6 months (Copies of company documents must be signed by an authorized person and affixed the company seal)
- Please note if your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is not travelling with you and is not your first-degree relatives (your parents and children). You need to provide a completed, signed, and sealed

Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

. The trustee is required to provide the proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling with you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes 
- Consular officers reserve the rights to request additional documents as deemed necessary
- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.
- Upon entering Thailand, the immigration officer may request evidence of adequate finance. For Transit visa, the value must be the equivalent of at least 20,000 Baht per person and 40,000 Baht per family.
Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5G0EQd16yoNAtVeVBGSQMr/4e259e8070c1557cdd490c3faf6d60ca/non-immigration-business-single-entry-visa-checklist-july-2022.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
- One color photograph
- 2 Inch * 2 Inch
- 3.2 to 3.6 cm face Height
- Photo must have white background
- full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses
- Must be taken within last 6 months

## Processing Time
Processing Time will be approximately 4-5 working days. 
Note :
- If there is any further verification required on the submitted documents there will be a further delay in the above mentioned processing time.
- The travel date should be minimum seven working days from the date of submission at Thailand Visa Application Centre.

## Download Forms
Please click here to download 
Thailand Visa application form. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3OvEl8GNIpovwh2h0RjW6T/ad6798446489f7aa98d83158b98fd9f7/thailand-visa-application-form.pdf)
Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

visa_types.name: Non-Immigration (B) Working Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Passport and one copy of passport bio page or travel document with validity not less than 6 months and contain at least ONE completely empty visa page.
- Completed and signed application Form
- Photo. One copy of 2 inch size photo (photo must have white background with a full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses and must be taken within 6 months)
- Original and one copy of Valid Taiwan ID card or Residency visa
- Original letter from Employer in Thailand to Thailand Trade and Economic Office listing the details of employment as following:  employing position, length of employment, salary. (Original in the company’s letter head)
- Original and one photocopy of the Letter of Approval to work in Thailand issued by the Ministry of Labour of Thailand (
WP.3 (https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/YykHYtRMc8/Visa/wWP3.jpg)

) OR Industrial Estate Authority of Thailand (
IEAT (https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/YykHYtRMc8/Visa/wIEAT.png)
)
- Academic certificate (original and one photocopy)
- Evidence of work experience issued by the former/current employer (the period of employment, the employer's name and the position held etc.)
- Please note if your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is not travelling with you and is not your first-degree relatives (your parents and children). You need to provide a completed, signed, and sealed

Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

. The trustee is required to provide the proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling with you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes 
- Consular officers reserve the rights to request additional documents as deemed necessary
- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.
- Upon entering Thailand, the immigration officer may request evidence of adequate finance. For Transit visa, the value must be the equivalent of at least 20,000 Baht per person and 40,000 Baht per family.
Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/43Cm42Gb4rSe9oMUexl45W/b2536a43932281bd87e0c6793da54dd3/non-immigration-working-visa-checklist-2022.pdf)

## Overview

## Non-Immigration (B) Working Visa
This type of visa is issued to applicants who wish to enter the Kingdom of Thailand for  working, conducting business, or undertake investment activities purposes.

## Visa Fees

## Visa and VFS Service Fee

[Table:Non-Immigration (B) Working Visa]
Kindly Note: 
- Visa and VFS service fee listed above is per applicant.
- All fees and charges are non-refundable, even if the application is refused or withdrawn.

- Applicants are requested to collect appropriate receipts while opting for any additional services.

## Documents Required

- Completed and signed application Form
- Photo. One copy of 2 inch size photo (photo must have white background with a full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses and must be taken within 6 months)
- Original and one copy of Valid Taiwan ID card or Residency visa
- Original letter from Employer in Thailand to Thailand Trade and Economic Office listing the details of employment as following:  employing position, length of employment, salary. (Original in the company’s letter head)

WP.3 (https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/YykHYtRMc8/Visa/wWP3.jpg)

) OR Industrial Estate Authority of Thailand (
IEAT (https://image.mfa.go.th/mfa/0/YykHYtRMc8/Visa/wIEAT.png)
)
- Academic certificate (original and one photocopy)
- Evidence of work experience issued by the former/current employer (the period of employment, the employer's name and the position held etc.)

Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

. The trustee is required to provide the proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling with you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes

- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.

Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/43Cm42Gb4rSe9oMUexl45W/b2536a43932281bd87e0c6793da54dd3/non-immigration-working-visa-checklist-2022.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
- One color photograph
- 2 Inch * 2 Inch
- 3.2 to 3.6 cm face Height
- Photo must have white background
- full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses
- Must be taken within last 6 months

## Processing Time
Processing Time will be approximately 4-5 working days. 
Note :
- If there is any further verification required on the submitted documents there will be a further delay in the above mentioned processing time.
- The travel date should be minimum seven working days from the date of submission at Thailand Visa Application Centre.

visa_types.name: Tourist Single Entry Visa (TR)
visa_types.documents_required:
- Passport or travel document with validity not less than 6 months and contain at least ONE completely empty visa page.
- Completed and signed application Form
- Photo One 2 Inch size photo within 6 months.
- Valid Taiwan ID card or Taiwan Resident card.
- Confirmed Air ticket with name, air ticket number and ports.
- In case of going to Thailand for medical treatment, a letter from a doctor or hospital in Thailand or medical appointment is required
- Please note if your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is not travelling with you and is not your first-degree relatives (your parents and children). You need to provide
                                a completed, signed, and sealed
Authorization Letter (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/76nD8NztvguQ2p5YnU7nzu/92754682717347c55589cb26d3c9813a/Authorization-Letter-English-Recent.pdf)
. The trustee is required to provide
                                the proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling
                                with you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes :
- Consular officers reserve the rights to request additional documents as deemed necessary
- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.
- Upon entering Thailand, the immigration officer may request evidence of adequate finance. For Transit visa, the value must be the equivalent of at least 20,000 Baht per person and
                                40,000 Baht per family.
Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2S9mn8v7blzGCIcMwGJ5pK/4150d631720db94e76639b535cf6316d/tourist-visa-single-entry.pdf)

- 3.2 to 3.6 cm face Height
- Photo must have white background
- full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses
- Must be taken within last 6 months

## Processing Time
Processing Time will be approximately 4-5 working days.
Note :
- If there is any further verification required on the submitted documents there will be a further delay in the above mentioned processing time.
- The travel date should be minimum seven working days from the date of submission at Thailand Visa Application Centre.

## Download Forms
Please click here to download 
Thailand Visa application form. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3OvEl8GNIpovwh2h0RjW6T/ad6798446489f7aa98d83158b98fd9f7/thailand-visa-application-form.pdf)
Sample of Thailand Visa application form  (https://images.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7m1NlEkZX4tQbqcok18tNc/491e4b6a5909b1f7e1b4115b81b74fbe/sample-of-thailand-visa-application-form.jpg)
Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)

visa_types.name: Tourist Multiple Entry visa (METV)
visa_types.documents_required:
- Passport or travel document with validity not less than 6 months and contain at least ONE completely empty visa page.
- Completed and signed application form
- Photo One copy of 2 inch size photo
- Valid Taiwan ID card or Residency visa
- Confirmed Round trip air ticket
- Proof of accommodation in Thailand (for the first visit)
- Financial Evidence
- Individual travelers: copy of bank statements and passbooks with detailed deposit records for the past 6 months (updated no longer than 1 day before the submission date showing
                                    a deposit of the amount equal to and not less than NTD$200,000)
- Family members travelling together: copy of bank statements and passbooks with detailed deposit records for the past 6 months (updated no longer than 1 day before the submission
                                    date showing a deposit of the amount equal to and not less than NTD$ 400,000) *one bank account can be used for the whole immediate family.
- Employment details
- Letter confirming their employment details with the company letter head, The employment letter must be addressed to the Thailand Trade and Economic Office, signed by an authorized
                                    person and affixed the company seal (validity of the letter is one month) and copy of the company's license with the original signature of the company's authorized person
                                    and the original company seal.
- Letter confirming students status. The letter with the school letter head and must be addressed to the Thailand Trade and Economic Office, signed by an authorized person and
                                    affixed the school seal (validity of the letter is one month)
- Please note if your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is not travelling with you and is not your first-degree relatives (your parents and children). You need to provide
                                a completed, signed, and sealed

Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)
The trustee is required to provide the
                                proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling with
                                you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes :
- For nationals from Afghanistan, Algeria, Bangladesh, Cameroon, China, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Egypt, Equatorial Guinea, Ghana, Guinea, India, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Liberia,
                                Libya, Middle Africa, Nepal, Nigeria, North Korea, Pakistan, Palestine, Republic of the Congo, Sao Tome and Principe, Sierra Leone, Somalia, Sri Lanka Sudan, Syria, and Yemen
                                must have a resident visa (ARC) in Taiwan to apply for a tourist visa and have to submit the application in person.
- For other nationals other than the countries listed above can also apply for a visa if they can prove that they legally entered and stayed in Taiwan.
- Consular officers reserve the rights to request additional documents as deemed necessary
- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.
- Upon entering Thailand, the immigration officer may request evidence of adequate finance. For Transit visa, the value must be the equivalent of at least 20,000 Baht per person and
                                40,000 Baht per family.
Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1A99qWBp9zQNhpcTSTAFri/25dfc730e7e6c12ceb7584bfed4901b2/Tourist-Visa-Multiple.pdf)
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing Time will be approximately 4-5 working days.
Note :
- If there is any further verification required on the submitted documents there will be a further delay in the above mentioned processing time.
- The travel date should be minimum seven working days from the date of submission at Thailand Visa Application Centre.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

## Tourist Multiple Entry visa (METV)
This type of visa is issued to applicants who wish to enter the Kingdom of Thailand for Tourism and Medical Treatment multiple times. Suitable for those who have the right of abode in
                              Taiwan

## Visa Fees

## Visa and VFS Service Fee

[Table:Tourist Multiple Entry visa (METV)]
Kindly Note:
- Visa and VFS service fee listed above is per applicant
- All fees and charges are non-refundable, even if the application is refused or withdrawn
- The fee mentioned includes all Local Taxes
- Applicants are requested to collect appropriate receipts while opting for any additional services

## Documents Required
- Passport or travel document with validity not less than 6 months and contain at least ONE completely empty visa page.
- Completed and signed application form
- Photo One copy of 2 inch size photo
- Valid Taiwan ID card or Residency visa
- Confirmed Round trip air ticket
- Proof of accommodation in Thailand (for the first visit)
- Financial Evidence
- Individual travelers: copy of bank statements and passbooks with detailed deposit records for the past 6 months (updated no longer than 1 day before the submission date showing
                                    a deposit of the amount equal to and not less than NTD$200,000)
- Family members travelling together: copy of bank statements and passbooks with detailed deposit records for the past 6 months (updated no longer than 1 day before the submission
                                    date showing a deposit of the amount equal to and not less than NTD$ 400,000) *one bank account can be used for the whole immediate family.
- Employment details
- Letter confirming their employment details with the company letter head, The employment letter must be addressed to the Thailand Trade and Economic Office, signed by an authorized
                                    person and affixed the company seal (validity of the letter is one month) and copy of the company's license with the original signature of the company's authorized person
                                    and the original company seal.
- Letter confirming students status. The letter with the school letter head and must be addressed to the Thailand Trade and Economic Office, signed by an authorized person and
                                    affixed the school seal (validity of the letter is one month)
- Please note if your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is not travelling with you and is not your first-degree relatives (your parents and children). You need to provide
                                a completed, signed, and sealed

Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)
The trustee is required to provide the
                                proof of identification such as an Identity Card and also need to provide your original Identity Card. If your visa application is submitted by a trustee who is travelling with
                                you, then you do not need the Authorization Letter, but a trustee must provide your original Identity Card.
Notes :
- For nationals from Afghanistan, Algeria, Bangladesh, Cameroon, China, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Egypt, Equatorial Guinea, Ghana, Guinea, India, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Liberia,
                                Libya, Middle Africa, Nepal, Nigeria, North Korea, Pakistan, Palestine, Republic of the Congo, Sao Tome and Principe, Sierra Leone, Somalia, Sri Lanka Sudan, Syria, and Yemen
                                must have a resident visa (ARC) in Taiwan to apply for a tourist visa and have to submit the application in person.
- For other nationals other than the countries listed above can also apply for a visa if they can prove that they legally entered and stayed in Taiwan.
- Consular officers reserve the rights to request additional documents as deemed necessary
- The issuance of visa is under the discretion of the TTEO. The TTEO refuses to explain the reason for visa rejection.
- Upon entering Thailand, the immigration officer may request evidence of adequate finance. For Transit visa, the value must be the equivalent of at least 20,000 Baht per person and
                                40,000 Baht per family.
Please click here to download the checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1A99qWBp9zQNhpcTSTAFri/25dfc730e7e6c12ceb7584bfed4901b2/Tourist-Visa-Multiple.pdf)

## Photo Specifications
- One color photograph
- 2 Inch * 2 Inch
- 3.2 to 3.6 cm face Height
- Photo must have white background
- full face view of the person without wearing a hat or dark glasses
- Must be taken within last 6 months

## Processing Time
Processing Time will be approximately 4-5 working days.
Note :
- If there is any further verification required on the submitted documents there will be a further delay in the above mentioned processing time.
- The travel date should be minimum seven working days from the date of submission at Thailand Visa Application Centre.

## Download Forms
Please click here to download 
Thailand Visa application form. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3OvEl8GNIpovwh2h0RjW6T/ad6798446489f7aa98d83158b98fd9f7/thailand-visa-application-form.pdf)
Authorization Letter. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/78M9d3KwfuS8yJvOgMdfsX/0583ea3e10692ca059755574db1c8cfe/Authorization-Letter-latest.pdf)
